title: Permission to Take Course Off-Campus
content:
Permission to Take Course Off-Campus
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to request permission to take a course or credit-by-exam (CLEP, Saylor, Straighterline) at another institution.

Written permission is required before registering at another institution. Approval is needed from your department advisor, chairperson(s), and Dean from your School/College of Major.

---

STEP 1: GATHER REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
You must have a course description from the college or university where you plan to take the course.

---

STEP 2: REVIEW UNIVERSITY POLICIES
- Graduating seniors are prohibited from taking courses at other institutions (unless they receive a 30-hour rule waiver from the Dean).
- Courses with a failing grade (D or F) must be repeated at Morgan State University.
- You are responsible for requesting that the other institution send an official transcript to Morgan State.
- If the institution is not affiliated with a U.S. accrediting body, you must obtain a NACES.ORG evaluation.

---

STEP 3: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your full name.

---

STEP 4: ENTER ACADEMIC INFORMATION
Enter your catalog, major, GPA, and credits earned. For credits earned, use the "Credits Applied" value from Degreeworks. Note: This value includes in-progress credits, so subtract any credits from courses you are currently taking.

---

STEP 5: ENTER CLASSIFICATION
Enter your classification.

IMPORTANT FOR SENIORS:
- Your official transcript with final grades from the other institution must be submitted by the final grades deadline.
- You will not be allowed to participate in commencement if degree requirements are incomplete.
- There is a risk if the transcript from the other institution is not received by Morgan State's deadline.

---

STEP 6: ENTER JUSTIFICATION AND COURSE INFORMATION
Enter your justification for taking the course off-campus. Provide the off-campus course information (institution name, course title, course number). Attach the course description from the other institution.

---

STEP 7: ENTER MSU COURSE EQUIVALENT
Enter the Morgan State course that the off-campus course is equivalent to. Use the transfer credit equivalency tool to look up equivalencies.

---

STEP 8: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 20 business days.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Off-Campus Course Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vl5hq6xJT_X4w_xYOyzCMiZKtOJ7A_5K/view)
